metadata.description: Direct-install marketplace for the ForgeProof plugin

plugins.name: forgeproof
plugins.description: Converts GitHub issues into working code with cryptographically signed provenance bundles. Every file edit, design decision, and test result is recorded in a tamper-evident Ed25519 hash chain. The .rpack bundle lets reviewers verify AI-generated code was not altered after creation — no external services, no API keys, pure local cryptography.
